Welcome back team. In this video we're going to go over Woofoo Forms as an overview. We're going to cover some of the features and some of the ways that we recommend you use Woofoo Forms. So Woofoo is a really great platform. They have a free account. They also have pro accounts. They do limit you on the number of responses and number of forms with a free account. So you may want to consider upgrading to pro. We'll give you some videos on how to get an account set up and upgrade there if you want. So Woofoo allows you to build and customize online forms super easily. You can collect data, payments and files. You're able to automate workflows to save time with integrations. And you can review and analyze the data that you collect. Now some of the uses that we have for Woofoo is to create custom branded forms for staff and members to gauge interest and get data from them. You're also able to automate sending data using form submission to Zapier triggers and embed forms in ClickFunnels and other pages to gather lead information and qualify leads. So a lot of times we'll have a Woofoo form inside of a ClickFunnel. That way you're able to get a little bit more interest and get them a little more invested by providing that information to complete the sign up process. Let us know if you have any questions about Woofoo. We're definitely happy to help with our Rockstar tech support team. And I hope you have a great rest of your day.
